SESSendingDisabled.^description: Email sending is currently disabled for this SES account. This may be intentional (sandbox mode) or indicate an account-level sending pause due to reputation issues. Verify sending status matches your intended configuration.

SESDKIMNotEnabled.^description: DKIM signing is not enabled for this SES email identity. DKIM (DomainKeys Identified Mail) adds a digital signature to outbound emails, allowing receiving mail servers to verify the email was sent by your domain and was not modified in transit. Without DKIM, emails are more likely to be marked as spam.
SESDKIMNotEnabled.shortDesc: Enable DKIM for SES email identity

SESNoConfigurationSet.^description: No SES configuration sets are defined. Configuration sets allow you to associate event destinations (SNS, CloudWatch, Kinesis) with sending operations to track bounces, complaints, deliveries, and other email events.
SESNoConfigurationSet.shortDesc: Create SES configuration sets for event tracking

SESNoSuppressionList.^description: No suppression list reasons are configured. The SES account-level suppression list automatically prevents sending to addresses that have previously bounced or complained. Configuring suppression reasons protects your sender reputation by avoiding repeat sends to problematic addresses.
